_SECURITY_WARNING: Use RANDOM slugs, NOT usernames! Generate with: python -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_urlsafe(12))"
_OAUTH_NOTE: Set 'auth_secret' (long random string) per user to enable OAuth login at /mcp. Generate with: python -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_urlsafe(32))". Can also be set via env var KIMAI_USER_<SLUG>_AUTH_SECRET. Users without auth_secret cannot use OAuth.
